name: NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC
business: We operate in the gold mining industry, primarily focused on advancing the Donlin Gold project in Alaska. We do not produce gold or any other minerals, and do not currently generate operating earnings.

exposures.sentence: We operate in the gold mining industry, primarily focused on advancing the Donlin Gold project in Alaska.

catalysts.event: Prime Contractor selection for Bankable Feasibility Study
catalysts.sentence: Proposals were received in October, and the Prime Contractor is expected to be selected in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of Supplemental Environmental Impact Statement
catalysts.sentence: The USACE has submitted a schedule to the Permitting Council for completion of the supplemental analysis in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: Option to prepay the Barrick promissory note expires
catalysts.sentence: On June 3, 2025 the Company entered into an amended and restated secured promissory note with Barrick that provides the Company with an option to prepay the promissory note in full for $100 million on or before December 3, 2026.
